name: Tex's Cantina
tagline: Authentic Tex-Mex. Cold Beer. Good Times.

location.directions: Right off I-35, look for the giant sombrero sign.

starters.name: Queso Fundido
starters.description: Melted cheese with chorizo and peppers

mains.name: Brisket Tacos (3)
mains.description: Slow smoked brisket, pickled onion, salsa verde

mains.name: Enchiladas Rojas
mains.description: 3 enchiladas, red chile sauce, rice & beans

mains.name: The Cantina Burger
mains.description: 1/2 lb beef, pepper jack, jalapeños, chipotle mayo

mains.name: Fajita Platter
mains.description: Chicken or steak, peppers, onions, tortillas, all the fixings

mains.name: Tex's Famous Chili Bowl
mains.description: Slow cooked beef chili, cornbread, sour cream

drinks.name: Margarita (Classic)
drinks.description: Lime, triple sec, tequila — rocks or frozen

drinks.name: Local Draft Beer
drinks.description: Ask your server for today's taps

specials: 🎉 Weekend Brunch: 10am-2pm Sat & Sun — bottomless mimosas $15

reservations.note: Reservations for parties of 6 or more. Walk-ins welcome for smaller groups.
reservations.how: Call us at (254) 555-0192 or ask the bot to submit a request!
